overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring an industrial cave facility. The character walks through a narrow metallic corridor into a larger circular stone chamber covered by a green tarp canopy, examining abandoned mining equipment before returning to the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with steam pipes and metal walls

events.description: steam vents release white vapor on the left side of the corridor
character slows approach as reaching the large security door at corridor end

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow metallic corridor toward the large security door, passing steam vents on the left

entered.detail: rusted metal walls with industrial pipes and equipment racks
heavy metal double door with horizontal reinforcement bars and central locking mechanism
single circular industrial light illuminating the corridor
wall-mounted pipe releasing periodic bursts of white steam

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit industrial corridor with metal walls and a grated floor. Steam vents periodically release vapor on the left side as the character approaches a large security door at the end of the hallway, illuminated by a single overhead light fixture.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular stone chamber with green tarp canopy covering abandoned mining equipment

events.description: character exits the metal corridor and enters the larger stone chamber with green tarp overhead
character stops to observe the industrial scaffolding and excavation equipment
character turns and begins walking back toward the corridor entrance

agents.ego_description: exploring the perimeter of the stone chamber, examining abandoned industrial equipment and metal scaffolding under the green canopy before returning

entered.detail: large green fabric canopy stretched overhead covering the entire chamber
rough natural stone walls with visible rock texture forming the chamber boundary
rusted metal support beams and platforms with safety railings
large abandoned mining machinery with yellow warning stripes and mechanical arms
small industrial lights suspended from the canopy framework

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into a circular stone chamber covered by a green tarp canopy. The space contains abandoned industrial mining equipment and metal scaffolding against the natural rock walls. The character walks along the perimeter examining the machinery, then turns and walks back toward the metal security door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial hallway into a vast, sheltered cavern before retreating back to the entrance. It begins with the character navigating a narrow, dimly lit corridor of metal walls and grated floors, passing periodic bursts of steam from vents on the left. As the character approaches a single overhead light, the scene opens through a large security door into a wide circular stone chamber sheltered by a green tarp canopy. The camera then tracks the character along the perimeter of the room, passing abandoned mining equipment and metal scaffolding set against natural rock walls, before finally turning back toward the metallic security door.
